mapper.sql: id, wl_type, wl_value, wl_reason, status, creator_id, creator_name, is_del, c_time, u_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_white_list WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT FROM sys_white_list WHERE wl_value = #{wlValue} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_white_list WHERE wl_type = #{wlType} AND is_del = 0 AND status = 1
